creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
$ poudriere testport -j 112amd64 cad/openscad-devel
[...]
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: /usr/local/bin/openscad is linked to /usr/local/lib/qt5/libQt5Network.so.5 from net/qt5-network but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need USES=qt:5 and USE_QT+=network
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/locale/uk/LC_MESSAGES/openscad.mo
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1

Maybe remove the port in favor of cad/openscad which is newer.
